mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO vacuum_raw_metrics ( database_id, instance_id, collected_at, table_name, schema_name, session_phase, session_progress, autovacuum, heap_blks_total, heap_blks_scanned, heap_blks_vacuumed, index_vacuum_count, n_dead_tup, n_live_tup, n_mod_since_analyze, tuples_deleted, session_started_at, elapsed_seconds, session_trigger, relsize_total_bytes, created_at ) VALUES
( #{m.databaseId}, #{m.instanceId}, #{m.collectedAt}, #{m.tableName}, #{m.schemaName}, #{m.sessionPhase}, #{m.sessionProgress}, #{m.autovacuum}, #{m.heapBlksTotal}, #{m.heapBlksScanned}, #{m.heapBlksVacuumed}, #{m.indexVacuumCount}, #{m.nDeadTup}, #{m.nLiveTup}, #{m.nModSinceAnalyze}, #{m.tuplesDeleted}, #{m.sessionStartedAt}, #{m.elapsedSeconds}, #{m.sessionTrigger}, #{m.relsizeTotalBytes}, NOW() )
